title: DVLA annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "The following includes some of DVLA’s achievements for 2024 to 2025 included in this year’s report. We:   dealt with 99.4 million individual customer transactions,  with 84% of this year’s transactions processed through our digital channels processed nearly 5 billion digital interactions collected £8.4 billion in Vehicle Excise Duty (VED) raised more than £274 million through the sale of personalised registrations issued 12.5 million driving licences and 17.9 million V5Cs made more than 832,000 medical licensing decisions, an increase of 15% from last year have had over 4 million customers sign up for a Driver and vehicles account answered 14 million queries through our Contact Centre retained our Customer Service Excellence standard for the 17th year recycled 79% of our waste, with less than 1% sent to landfill raised £31,716 for Alzheimer’s Society  "
